doctrine: Model bindings are MUTABLE OPERATIONAL CONFIGURATION — they evolve with frontier fit and never require editing a frozen constitutional artifact. The frozen coordination/governance/role_bindings.json is the constitutional fallback; this registry overrides per-role when an entry is ACTIVE and fully attributed (effective_at, authorized_by, change_record). Under-attributed entries are ignored fail-closed. Resolver: backend/helm_runtime/extensions/model_routing.py.
provenance: A7 remediation — extracted from the drifted frozen role_bindings.json (builder rebound to claude-sonnet-5 on 2026-07-18 in-place; preserved in coordination/evidence/a7_drift_20260719/frozen_target_drift.patch)

bindings.authorized_by: Michael Bryan Hoch (founder; original in-place edit 2026-07-18, re-homed to this registry by accepted A7 disposition 2026-07-19)
